name: Fashion glasses
summary: Fashion glasses with transparent frames and reflective lenses in different colors, without UV protection. The logo is placed on the stem of the glasses.
descriptionLong: Fashion glasses with transparent frames and reflective lenses in different colors, without UV protection. The logo is placed on the stem of the glasses.

name: Sunglasses with bamboo temples
summary: Sunglasses made of high-quality plastic with UV 400 protection, filter category 3 and foldable temples made of bamboo.
descriptionLong: Sunglasses made of high-quality plastic with UV 400 protection, filter category 3 and foldable temples made of bamboo.

name: Sunglasses with UV400 protection
summary: Sunglasses in "Two Tone" design made of high-quality plastic with UV 400 protection, filter category 3 and foldable temples.
descriptionLong: Sunglasses in "Two Tone" design made of high-quality plastic with UV 400 protection, filter category 3 and foldable temples.

name: Polarized sunglasses
summary: Polarized Schwarzwolf sunglasses. The sunglasses frame and arms are black with red details on both arms with metalic hinges decorated with Schwarzwolf logo. Polarized glasses reduce unpleasant glare and eye fatigue. T...
descriptionLong: Polarized Schwarzwolf sunglasses. The sunglasses frame and arms are black with red details on both arms with metalic hinges decorated with Schwarzwolf logo. Polarized glasses reduce unpleasant glare and eye fatigue. They have black lenses with UV400 protection suitable for outdoor activities and sports. Comes in a black microfibre pouch and a practical hard black case with a zipper. Includes a white microfibre cleaning cloth suitable for sublimation. Packed in a gift box.

descriptionLong: Polarized Schwarzwolf sports sunglasses with coloured lens. The suglasses are made in black colour with Schwarzwof logo on the glasses legs. The lenses have UV400 protection. Comes with a black microfibre pouch and a hard black case with a zipper. Includes a white microfibre cleaning cloth suitable for sublimation. Packed in a Schwarzwolf gift box.

name: Polarized sports sunglasses
summary:
Polarized Schwarzwolf sports sunglasses with colored lenses. The sunglasses frame is made in white with grey 
details and have UV 400 protection. These sports glasses with polarized lenses eliminate annoying glare and...
descriptionLong:
Polarized Schwarzwolf sports sunglasses with colored lenses. The sunglasses frame is made in white with grey 
details and have UV 400 protection. These sports glasses with polarized lenses eliminate annoying glare and improve 
visibility of details in the field. The result is less eye fatigue and more natural color perception even in strong sunlight. 
Great for running, cycling, water sports and everyday wear. Comes in a black microfibre pouch and a practical hard black 
case with a zipper. Includes a white microfibre cleaning cloth suitable for sublimation. Packed in a gift box.

The result is less eye fatigue and more natural color perception even in strong sunlight. Great for running, cycling, water sports and everyday wear. Comes in a black microfibre pouch and a practical hard black case with a zipper. Includes a white microfibre cleaning cloth suitable for sublimation. Packed in a gift box.

name: Hard case for sunglasses
summary: Schwarzwolf hard case for sunglasses. The case is made of black canvas and velvet material. The case has a zipper with Schwarzwolf logo on the zipper slider. The case includes a black microfibre pouch and a white micr...
descriptionLong: Schwarzwolf hard case for sunglasses. The case is made of black canvas and velvet material. The case has a zipper with Schwarzwolf logo on the zipper slider. The case includes a black microfibre pouch and a white microfibre cleaning cloth suitable for sublimation. Packed in a gift box.
